title: Clarify robot Data API token lifecycle
summary: Documents the robot Data API token flow, refresh rules, and compatibility notes so operators can use short-lived JWTs safely.

items: Add docs/robot-data-api-authentication.md to explain the robot consumer secret vs Data API JWT split, token minting, refresh/revocation rules, and passive bundle compatibility notes
Update docs/gpt-bot.md to point operators at the new token lifecycle guide and explain that the example mints short-lived JWTs at runtime instead of storing a static Data API token
Update the robot dashboard and API docs fixtures/tests so the generated docs describe refresh behavior, tokenVersion invalidation, robotAddress, rpcServerUrl, and the missing-threads fallback
